name: impact
description: Maps merkle diff to affected beads: reads bead metadata, matches changed nodes, classifies actions (create/close/review).

requirements.title: Read bead metadata
requirements.description: Read spec-related fields from bead metadata: metadata.component, metadata.impl_section, metadata.module, metadata.spec_hash.

requirements.title: Match changed nodes to beads
requirements.description: Correlate changed spec nodes (from merkle diff) with existing beads using spec metadata fields.

requirements.title: Classify actions
requirements.description: Determine action for each affected bead: create (new spec nodes without beads), close (removed spec nodes with existing beads), review (modified spec nodes with existing beads).

requirements.title: Output impact report
requirements.description: Produce a structured JSON impact report listing all affected beads and their classified actions.

requirements.title: Deterministic matching
requirements.description: Same merkle diff + same bead state always produces the same impact report.

components.name: BeadReader
components.description: Reads bead metadata from the bead CLI (br or bd). Extracts the mapping record ID from the simplified bead label (spex:<record-id>) for correlation with spec nodes.

components.name: NodeMatcher
components.description: Matches changed spec nodes to beads using spec node IDs from the ID-based merkle diff. Correlates by matching spec node IDs against mapping record IDs, not by parsing paths or label conventions.

components.name: ActionClassifier
components.description: Determines the action (create/close/review) for each matched or unmatched spec node.

components.name: ReportGenerator
components.description: Produces the structured JSON impact report from classified actions.

components.name: ImpactCommand
components.description: CLI entry point for spex impact. Reads merkle diff, wires BeadReader, NodeMatcher, ActionClassifier, ReportGenerator, outputs impact report as JSON.

data_flows.name: Impact analysis flow
data_flows.description: Merkle diff + bead metadata → matched pairs → classified actions → impact report.
